area: Team plan dry-run / proposal-first side effects
finding: Optional `team plan` can fail with `ATM_TEAM_PLAN_INVALID` and register or expose a provisional proposal-first broker lane when the operator only wants a read-only readiness projection. It also used legacy actor `codex-gpt-5.4-mini` while the active task session actor was `codex-backlog-captain`.
expectedBehavior: Team planning should have an explicitly read-only projection mode for diagnostics such as `indexLane`; if it needs broker admission, it should prefer the active claim actor or require explicit `--actor` before writing/provisioning any lane state.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0195: `team plan --read-only` skips broker-registry cleanup persistence, downgrades `proposal-first-required` to warning, and prefers active claim actor via `resolveTeamPlanActorId`. Regression: `packages/cli/src/commands/team/__tests__/team-plan-readonly.spec.ts`.
followUp: Keep `team start` fail-closed; do not treat read-only plan as admission write.
